landing.hero_title: AqlAI Smarter Conversations with Multiple AI Models
landing.hero_subtitle: Switch seamlessly between top AI models in one unified interface. Ask anything in English or Arabic and receive intelligent, tailored responses. You can also download your conversations anytime.
landing.feature_PDF: You can export your conversations as PDF file
landing.feature_PDF_desc: saving them in your device to read, share, or keep for later.
landing.feature_bilingual_desc: Full English and Arabic support with proper RTL layout and localized responses.
landing.feature_history_desc: Your conversations are saved and AI generates a summary of your interests over time.
landing.about_desc: AqlAI combines multiple AI models into a single, beautiful interface. Whether you're researching, brainstorming, or just curious — switch models on the fly and get diverse perspectives.

auth.login_subtitle: Sign in to continue your conversations
auth.signup_subtitle: Join AqlAI and start exploring AI
auth.auth.error_email_format: Please enter a valid email address

chat.start_prompt: Start a conversation by typing a message below.
chat.error_send: Failed to send message. Please try again.

profile.title: Your Profile
profile.summary_empty: Chat more to generate a summary of your interests and patterns.
profile.summary_not_enough: Need at least 5 messages to generate a summary.
